preToolUse.command: if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then gitleaks detect --no-banner --redact --source=$TOOL_FILE 2>&1 | grep -q 'leaks found' && echo DENY: potential secret detected in $TOOL_FILE && exit 1; fi; true

postToolUse.command: if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then gitleaks detect --no-banner --redact --source=$TOOL_FILE 2>/dev/null || true; fi; true
